name: ISO11783 TC IL Network Properties
title: ISO11783 TC IL Network Properties
tables: Defines delay (im ms) when sending each FP packet (for Fast Packet transmitting).
Defines the interval time (in millisec) between each TP DT packet (for BAM transmitting).
Defines the interval time (in millisec) between the TP.CM_RTS and TP.CM_CTS (for the receiver of the CMDT transmitting).
Defines the interval time (in millisec) between the last TP.DT and TP.CM_ EndOfMsgACK (for the receiver of the CMDT transmitting).
Defines delay (in millisec) for sending the TP.Conn_Abort message (for both the sender and the receiver of the CMDT transmission).
Defines delay (im millisec) when sending each TP.DT message (for the transmitter of the CMDT transmitting).
Maximum number of bytes, which can be transferred.
Number of packets, which are requested by CTS.
Number of packets, which is used with RTS.
Number of packets, which are requested by ECTS (Extended TP).
Target address, which is used for BAM. 0: Target address is 0xFF 1: Specific target address is used
Maximal number of retransmission that the interaction layer supports. (Retransmission can be requested by the message TP.CM_CTS).
Priority used by the transport protocol.
Arbitrary Address Capable field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939AAC
Industry Group field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939IndustryGroup
Vehicle System Instance field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939SystemInstance
Vehicle System field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939System
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939Function
Function Instance field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939FunctionInstance
ECU Instance field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939ECUInstance
Manufacturer Code field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939ManufacturerCode
Identity Number field of J1939 NAME
Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939IdentityNumber
Type of Address Claim support 0: No Address Claim support1: Basic Address Claim support2: Extended Address Claim support
